ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ٱلْحَآقَّةُ ١
ayahs.translation: The Inevitable Reality -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ ٢
ayahs.translation: What is the Inevitable Reality?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَدْرَٮٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ ٣
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادُۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ ٤
ayahs.translation: Thamūd and ʿAad denied the Striking Calamity [i.e., the Resurrection].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهْلِكُواْ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ ٥
ayahs.translation: So as for Thamūd, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast].

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُواْ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ ٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّا عَادٌ فَاُهۡلِكُوۡا بِرِيۡحٍ صَرۡصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And as for ʿAad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind

ayahs.textUthmani: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ ٧
ayahs.textIndopak: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبۡعَ لَيَالٍ وَّثَمٰنِيَةَ اَيَّامٍۙ حُسُوۡمًا ۙ فَتَرَى الۡقَوۡمَ فِيۡهَا صَرۡعٰىۙ كَاَنَّهُمۡ اَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ​ ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
ayahs.transliteration: Sakkhara-haa 'alaihim sab'a la-yaalinw Wa-samaaniyata ayyaamin husooman fataral qawma feehaa sar'aa ka-annahum a'jaazu nakhlin khaawiyah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ ٨
ayahs.translation: Then do you see of them any remains?

ayahs.textUthmani: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ ٩
ayahs.textIndopak: وَجَآءَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَنۡ قَبۡلَهٗ وَالۡمُؤۡتَفِكٰتُ بِالۡخَـاطِئَةِ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-jaaa'a Firawnu Wa-man qablahoo wal-mu'tafikaatu bil-khaati'ah

ayahs.textUthmani: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَعَصَوْاْ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً ١٠
ayahs.textIndopak: فَعَصَوۡا رَسُوۡلَ رَبِّهِمۡ فَاَخَذَهُمۡ اَخۡذَةً رَّابِيَةً‏
ayahs.translation: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].
ayahs.transliteration: Fa'asaw Rasoola Rabbihim fa-akhazahum akhzatar raabiyah

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ ١١
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا الۡمَآءُ حَمَلۡنٰكُمۡ فِى الۡجَارِيَةِ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried you [i.e., your ancestors] in the sailing ship
ayahs.transliteration: Innaa lammaa taghal maaa'u hamalnaakum fil jaariyah

ayahs.textUthmani: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٲعِيَةٌ ١٢
ayahs.textIndopak: لِنَجۡعَلَهَا لَـكُمۡ تَذۡكِرَةً وَّتَعِيَهَاۤ اُذُنٌ وَّاعِيَةٌ‏

words.translation: and would be conscious of it

ayahs.translation: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.
ayahs.transliteration: Li-naj'alahaa lakum tazki-ratanw-wa ta'iyahaa uzununw waa'iyah

ayahs.textUthmani: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٲحِدَةٌ ١٣
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاِذَا نُفِخَ فِى الصُّوۡرِ نَفۡخَةٌ وَّاحِدَةٌ ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-izaa nufikha fis soori nafkhatunw waahidah

ayahs.textUthmani: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٲحِدَةً ١٤
ayahs.textIndopak: وَحُمِلَتِ الۡاَرۡضُ وَ الۡجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَّاحِدَةً ۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow [i.e., stroke] -
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-humilatil ardu wal-jibaalu fadukkataa dakkatanw waahidah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ ١٥
ayahs.translation: Then on that Day, the Occurrence [i.e., Resurrection] will occur,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ ١٦
ayahs.translation: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا‌ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ ١٧
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّالۡمَلَكُ عَلٰٓى اَرۡجَآٮِٕهَا ​ؕ وَيَحۡمِلُ عَرۡشَ رَبِّكَ فَوۡقَهُمۡ يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].
ayahs.transliteration: Wal-malaku 'alaaa arjaaa'ihaa; Wa-yahmilu 'Arsha Rabbika fawqahum yawma'izin samaaniyah

ayahs.textUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ ١٨
ayahs.textIndopak: يَوۡمَٮِٕذٍ تُعۡرَضُوۡنَ لَا تَخۡفٰى مِنۡكُمۡ خَافِيَةٌ‏
ayahs.translation: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma'izin tu'radoona laa takhfaa min-kum khaafiyah

ayahs.textUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُواْ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ ١٩
ayahs.textIndopak: فَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِىَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِيَمِيۡنِهٖۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ هَآؤُمُ اقۡرَءُوۡا كِتٰبِيَهۡ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
ayahs.transliteration: Fa-ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo biyameenihee fa-yaqoolu haaa'umuq ra'oo kitaabiyah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ ٢١
ayahs.translation: So he will be in a pleasant life -

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: In an elevated garden,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

ayahs.textUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كُلُواْ وَٱشْرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـــَٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: كُلُوۡا وَاشۡرَبُوۡا هَنِيۡٓـــًٔا ۢ بِمَاۤ اَسۡلَفۡتُمۡ فِى الۡاَيَّامِ الۡخَـالِيَةِ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."
ayahs.transliteration: Kuloo washraboo haneee'am bimaaa aslaftum fil ayyaamil khaliyah

ayahs.textUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ ٢٥
ayahs.textIndopak: وَاَمَّا مَنۡ اُوۡتِىَ كِتٰبَهٗ بِشِمَالِهٖ  ۙ فَيَقُوۡلُ يٰلَيۡتَنِىۡ لَمۡ اُوۡتَ كِتٰبِيَهۡ​ۚ‏
ayahs.translation: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-ammaa man ootiya kitaabahoo bishimaalihee fa-yaqoolu yaalaitanee lam oota kitaaabiyah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: And had not known what is my account.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: I wish it [i.e., my death] had been the decisive one.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْۜ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: My wealth has not availed me.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: Gone from me is my authority."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: [Allāh will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ ٣١
ayahs.translation: Then into Hellfire drive him.

ayahs.textUthmani: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ ٣٢
ayahs.textIndopak: ثُمَّ فِىۡ سِلۡسِلَةٍ ذَرۡعُهَا سَبۡعُوۡنَ ذِرَاعًا فَاسۡلُكُوۡهُ ؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."
ayahs.transliteration: Summa fee silsilatin zar'uhaa sab'oona ziraa'an faslukooh

ayahs.textUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٣٣
ayahs.textIndopak: اِنَّهٗ كَانَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِاللّٰهِ الۡعَظِيۡمِۙ‏
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allāh, the Most Great,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِــُٔونَ ٣٧
ayahs.translation: None will eat it except the sinners.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: So I swear by what you see

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: And what you do not see

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the word of a noble Messenger.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ‌ۚ قَلِيلاً مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ ٤١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَّمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَاعِرٍ​ؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تُؤۡمِنُوۡنَۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa huwa biqawli shaa'ir; qaleelan maa tu'minoon

ayahs.textUthmani: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ‌ۚ قَلِيلاً مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ ٤٢
ayahs.textIndopak: وَلَا بِقَوۡلِ كَاهِنٍ​ؕ قَلِيۡلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُوۡنَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-laa biqawli kaahin; qaleelan maa tazakkaroon

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ ٤٣
ayahs.translation: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: And if he [i.e., Muḥammad] had made up about Us some [false] sayings,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: We would have seized him by the right hand;

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.

ayahs.textUthmani: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ ٤٧
ayahs.textIndopak: فَمَا مِنۡكُمۡ مِّنۡ اَحَدٍ عَنۡهُ حَاجِزِيۡنَ‏
ayahs.translation: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a reminder for the righteous.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسْرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ ٥١
ayahs.translation: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٥٢
ayahs.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
